description: Focused overhead evidence for admission-aware atlas instrumentation. The buckets deliberately separate lock-metrics disabled, lock-metrics enabled, atlas snapshot rendering, and planner cost so the result cannot be mistaken for a broad throughput proof.

scope_boundary.phase6_proof_note: No scheduler, sync, cancel, obligation, or channel implementation hot paths are edited by this evidence slice; the measurement harness lives in tests and artifacts only.

microharness_policy.interpretation: Wall-clock microharness values are scoped to overhead attribution and regression triage. They are not scheduler-performance, throughput, conformance, or production-admission proof.

buckets.surface: ContendedMutex default build without the lock-metrics feature
buckets.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_bt63nr12_lock_metrics_disabled CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test lock_contention_atlas_contract lock_metrics_disabled_overhead_probe_reports_per_op_cost -- --nocapture

buckets.surface: ContendedMutex with opt-in lock-metrics feature enabled
buckets.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_bt63nr12_lock_metrics_enabled CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --features lock-metrics --test lock_contention_atlas_contract lock_metrics_enabled_overhead_probe_reports_per_op_cost -- --nocapture

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_bt63nr12_swarm_planner_overhead CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test swarm_proof_lane_planner_contract atlas_overhead_microharness_reports_planner_and_renderer_costs -- --nocapture

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_bt63nr12_swarm_planner_overhead CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test swarm_proof_lane_planner_contract atlas_overhead_microharness_reports_planner_and_renderer_costs -- --nocapture

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_bt63nr12_swarm_planner_overhead CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test swarm_proof_lane_planner_contract atlas_overhead_microharness_reports_planner_and_renderer_costs -- --nocapture

closeout_requirements: Cite focused RCH validation for the lock-metrics disabled bucket.
Cite focused RCH validation for the lock-metrics enabled bucket.
Cite focused RCH validation for the planner and snapshot-rendering buckets.
State that production admission and production backpressure remain opt-in unless a later policy bead proves otherwise.
